AMENDED JUDGMENT JANUARY 08, 2001 THAT PLTF RECOVER JUDGMENT DEFENDAT BANK OF THE WEST IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,659.18, CONSISTING OF THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $9,253.80 PLUS PRE- JUDGMENT INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 7% FROM OCT. 19, 1998 TO THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
